name: FF_DATABASE_ITEMS
query: SELECT FF_DATABASE_ITEMS_B.DATABASE_ITEM_ID DATABASE_ITEM_ID, FF_DATABASE_ITEMS_B.BASE_USER_NAME USER_NAME, FF_DATABASE_ITEMS_B.USER_ENTITY_ID USER_ENTITY_ID, FF_DATABASE_ITEMS_B.DATA_TYPE DATA_TYPE, FF_DATABASE_ITEMS_B.NULL_ALLOWED_FLAG NULL_ALLOWED_FLAG, FF_DATABASE_ITEMS_B.DEFINITION_TEXT DEFINITION_TEXT, FF_DATABASE_ITEMS_B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, FF_DATABASE_ITEMS_B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE LAST_UPDATE_DATE, FF_DATABASE_ITEMS_B.LAST_UPDATED_BY LAST_UPDATED_BY, FF_DATABASE_ITEMS_B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, FF_DATABASE_ITEMS_B.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DATE, FF_DATABASE_ITEMS_B.CREATED_BY CREATED_BY, FF_DATABASE_ITEMS_B.MODULE_ID MODULE_ID FROM FF_DATABASE_ITEMS_B WITH CHECK OPTION
